name: Luau Pork Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into slices about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Drain the pineapple and reserve all the syrup.
3. In a blender, combine the reserved pineapple syrup, teriyaki sauce, finely chopped green onion, ground ginger, and garlic powder. Blend until smooth.
4. Pour the blended mixture over the pork and pineapple. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
5. Meanwhile, cook rice according to package directions.
6. Prepare grill.
7. Remove pork from marinade and grill about 5 inches above hot coals for about 5 minutes on each side or until fully cooked.
8. Pour the remaining pineapple and marinade into a large skillet and bring to a boil.
9. Remove from heat and serve pork with sauce and pineapple over rice.
